data.title: Docs update: CLAUDE.md + CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md + KNOWN-ISSUES
data.description:
As a DSO user or maintainer, I can find documentation for ref-library-loader.sh features, configuration keys, and known operational issues.

Done definitions:
- CLAUDE.md Architecture section references ref-library-loader.sh, implementation-plan integration hook, and cross-links to parent epics e471-dda3 and 0b7c-d811
- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents: MAX_CITATIONS_PER_TASK=6 constant, match-none default for empty topic tags, and all runtime guards (dso ref-query absence, confluence-fetch.sh absence, missing confluence.base_url, both-unavailable)
- KNOWN-ISSUES.md has entry describing CI scenario: dso installed but ref-query subcommand not registered (0b7c-d811 not yet in CI environment); explains the subcommand-registration check and how it differs from `command -v dso`
- Doc integrity gates pass

Considerations:
- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md
- [Integration] Cross-link to e471-dda3 + 0b7c-d811 docs so readers understand the three-epic relationship
